cards.text: LCS cost has reached RM11.22 billion — and delivery is finally arriving, more than a decade late.
cards.sub: Maharaja Lela began sea trials on 28 January 2026. First delivery is scheduled for December 2026. The programme was cut from six ships to five.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Original 2011 budget was RM6 billion; the ceiling escalated to RM9 billion late that year and finally to RM11.22 billion.
cards.s: PAC's 2022 report documented severe mismanagement and financial issues at Boustead Naval Shipyard before MOF Inc acquired and renamed it Lumut Naval Shipyard in 2024.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Multiple senior officers and former Boustead directors have faced MACC investigation and criminal proceedings.
cards.s: The 2022 PAC findings and subsequent referrals form the basis for ongoing accountability cases.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Even with first delivery imminent, the Royal Malaysian Navy has spent more than a decade waiting for vessels Singapore and Indonesia commissioned years ago.
cards.s: The capability gap during the delay forms the most damaging legacy of the procurement failure.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.text: The programme is no longer 'zero ships' — it is 'first ship 15 years late at twice the budget'. The accountability test is whether the 2022 PAC findings produce convictions.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.text: RM11.22 billion and 15 years for the first hull is the real benchmark — not a story of total failure, but of a procurement system that delivers eventually at unacceptable cost.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

issue_headline: LCS Cost Now RM11.2 Billion — First Ship in Sea Trials, Programme Cut From 6 to 5
